apierror-visualeditor-badcachekey: Ma jiro kaydin hore oo taxane samaynta ah oo leh furahaas
apihelp-visualeditor-param-basetimestamp: Marka la kaydinayo, u dhig wakhtiga dib u eegista la tafatiray. Waxaa loo adeegsadaa in lagu ogaado isku dhacyada wax ka beddelka.
apihelp-visualeditor-param-badetag: Haddii RESTBase weydiintu soo celiso ETag u muuqda mid aan sax ahayn, halkan ku gudbi si loo diiwaan geliyo.
apihelp-visualeditor-param-cachekey: Si loo taxane sameeyo ama kala duwanaansho loo sameeyo, isticmaal natiijada codsi serializeforcache oo hore oo leh furahan. Waxay beddeshaa $1html.
apihelp-visualeditor-param-editintro: Wax ka beddel hordhaca si loogu daro ogeysiisyada.
apihelp-visualeditor-param-html: HTML loo dirayo Parsoid si loogu beddelo wikitext.
apihelp-visualeditor-param-oldid: Lambarka dib u eegista la isticmaalayo (waxay si toos ah u noqotaa dib u eegista ugu dambeysa).
apihelp-visualeditor-param-preload: Bogga laga isticmaalo nuxurka haddii bogga la soo helay aanu weli lahayn nuxur.
apihelp-visualeditor-param-preloadparams: Halbeegyada lagu beddelayo bogga hore loo soo raray, haddii uu jiro.
apihelp-visualeditor-param-pst: Ka hor kaydinta u beddel wikitext ka hor inta aan loo dirin Parsoid (paction=parsefragment).
apihelp-visualeditor-param-starttimestam: Marka la kaydinayo, tan dhig waqtiga la soo raray bogga. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu ogaado isku dhaca wax ka beddelka.
apihelp-visualeditor-param-stash: Marka la kaydinayo, tan u dhig run haddii aad rabto inaad isticmaasho API-ga kaydinta ku meel gaarka ah.
apihelp-visualeditor-param-wikitext: Wikitext loo dirayo Parsoid si loogu beddelo HTML (paction=parsefragment).
apihelp-visualeditor-summary: Waxay soo celisaa HTML5 ee bogga laga helo adeegga Parsoid.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-basetimes: Marka la kaydinayo, tan dhig waqtiga dib u eegista la wax ka beddelay. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu ogaado isku dhaca wax ka beddelka.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-cachekey: Isticmaal natiijada codsi serializeforcache oo hore oo leh furahan. Waxay beddeshaa $1html.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-captchaid: Aqoonsiga CAPTCHA (marka la kaydinayo iyadoo la adeegsanayo jawaab CAPTCHA).
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-captchawo: Jawaabta captcha (marka la kaydinayo iyadoo la adeegsanayo jawaab captcha).
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-nocontent: Ka reeb nuxurka HTML ee dib u eegista cusub jawaabta.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-plugins: Barnaamijyo dheeraad ah oo la xiriira codsiga API-ga.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-data-{plu: Xog aan xadidnayn oo uu plugin-ku ku soo diro codsiga API-ga.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-html: HTML loo dirayo Parsoid si loogu beddelo wikitext.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-needcheck: Marka la kaydinayo, tan dhig haddii dib u eegistu yeelan karto dhibaatooyin safar wareeg ah. Tani waxay keeni doontaa in wax ka beddelka la calaamadeeyo.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-oldid: Lambarka dib u eegista la adeegsanayo. Haddii aan la cayimin, waxaa la isticmaalayaa dib u eegista ugu dambeysa.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-starttime: Marka la kaydinayo, u dhig wakhtiga boggu la raray. Waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu ogaado isku dhacyada wax ka beddelka.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-param-tags: Beddel calaamadaha lagu dabaqayo wax ka beddelka.
apihelp-visualeditoredit-summary: Ku keydi bog HTML5 ah MediaWiki (loogu beddelay wikitext iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegga Parsoid).
